## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] PR links to a valid issue.
- [ ] Scope matches the issue.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are satisfied.
- [ ] Tests or validation evidence are present.
- [ ] Security and identity implications are clear.
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included.
